title: NVIDIA RTX 50 Series Creates Frenzy at Newegg: 20-Minute Sellout Signals Massive GPU Demand
text:
NVIDIA RTX 50 Series Demand and Sales Analysis at Newegg.

Sellout Speed: The RTX 50 Series GPUs experienced rapid inventory depletion at Newegg, with inventory selling out entirely within 20 minutes, with most inventory claimed in just 5 minutes.

Demand Indicators: Searches for RTX 5080 and 5090 models increased 25-fold compared to the previous week. Newegg experienced an 8-10x surge in site traffic during the launch window. The RTX 50 Series accounted for 18 of the retailer's top 25 most-visited product pages. Nine of the top ten search queries focused on the 5080 and 5090 models.

Market Positioning: According to Newegg leadership, The response to the NVIDIA RTX 50 Series has been extraordinary, indicating strong enthusiasm from gaming enthusiasts, content creators, and system integrators. The launch was characterized as one of the most sought-after GPU launches in history.

Availability Strategy: Newegg committed to releasing additional inventory in real-time as stock becomes available and promoted a GPU trade-in program to help customers upgrade affordably.
